name: Impossible Ratatouille Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Garlic; crushed, minced or pressed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Lightly grease a pie plate.
3. Cook zucchini, eggplant, tomato, green pepper, onion, and garlic in butter or margarine until the vegetables are crisp-tender, about 5-10 minutes. Stir in seasonings.
4. Spread the mixture in the pie plate and sprinkle with cheese.
5. Beat remaining ingredients (milk, sour cream, Bisquick, egg) together until smooth using a blender on high for 15 seconds or a hand beater for 1 minute.
6. Pour the batter into the pie plate.
7. Bake until a knife inserted comes out clean, about 30-35 minutes.
8. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving. Makes 4-6 servings.
